task_description: Integrate @google/model-viewer into the LAUNCHPAD desktop Electron+React app and create the 3D Habitat World component with all 6 boxes (play, apps, library, create, watch, explore) mapped to their respective GLB models, following the prototype design in project/LAUNCHPAD Habitat.dc.html.

verification.summary: Vite build succeeds (2.81s, bundles model-viewer in index chunk). All 85 existing tests pass. No new unit tests needed as this is a visual UI component in an Electron app. HabitatWorld.jsx correctly maps all 6 boxes to GLB models, includes door animations, model-viewer integration, and is accessible via Ctrl+H or the home screen tile.
